text: Da’wah in the strict sense means an effort to propagate the teachings of Islam until all people, whether Muslim or non-Muslim, believe and embrace the faith. This research aims to conduct a special analysis of the approach of Da’wah based on Surah An-Nash (Qur’anic verses 16: 125-128) by using the classical tafsir called Ma’alim al-Tanzil of Imam Al-Baghawi. This study is conducted using the qualitative literature-based method by applying primary source, that is, the Qur’an and its tafsir by Imam Al-Baghawi and by utilizing the secondary sources in the form of journal articles and historical records. The data obtained are then processed using the *tahlily* (analytical) method of interpretation. The results obtained from this research study by Imam Al-Baghawi through the approach of Da’wah in the Surah An-Nash are as follows: 1. The use of hikmah (wisdom) according to the spirit of the Qur’an. 2. Conducting maw’izah hasanah in the form of a good advice in a humane and noble manner. 3. Conducting mujadalah (debate) in a dignified manner with wisdom and without using forced arguments nor aggression toward those who are contradicted. In addition, based on the analysis of the authors, there is an ethics on the principle of retribution that must be obeyed by a da’wah teacher that every retribution done to the contradicting party should be proportionate and not exaggerated.
